creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
The version history page (https://desktop.telegram.org/changelog) rarely updates. From the update info sent inside Telegram:

New in version 1.1.19:

— Search by messages of specific group members.
— Bug fixes and other minor improvements.

Same message is present on the github release page (https://github.com/telegramdesktop/tdesktop/releases) which also shows older changelogs.
